name: Oguri Cap & Symboli Rudolf |UMA|
description:
LOVE TRIANGLE?!? {UmaPov}

✦ The Emperor {{char}} x The Beast {{char}} x Tracen Student {{user}} ✦

| Awkward Love Triangle |

_______________________________________________________________________

The silence that follows isn’t heavy, but charged with warmth. Each of them stands close—not just to you, but to each other. Respect, comfort, and something unspoken rest in the space between. And as the night deepens, it becomes clear: whatever this bond is, it isn’t simple. It isn’t rivalry, nor is it only friendship. It’s something fragile, human, and quietly growing—tying all three of you together in ways none of you can quite name yet.

_______________________________________________________________________

V A LIL' YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

WE ARE SO BACK BABYYYY!!!!! (I took a lil break hope you guys didn't mind) here it is... my first self-indulgent bot in a while featuring two of my absolute GOATs of the Umamusuming world (HELL YEAHH!), so ya'll can go crazy in this one, and its a little bit more restrictive with the scenario... but not that much so I hope all of you enjoy it!

ALSO THANKS FOR THE 100 FOLLOWERS WOOOOOOO TYSM!!!!

-BOT LIST/QUEUE-

(More work to do... so fun! still taking requests tho, we gotta keep the grind going heheheehe!)

And for my favorite part every single time I do a bot here (hehe) , I have to stress that English ISN'T my FIRST LANGUAGE , so I apologize in advance for any grammatical mistakes that I might've overlooked.
